ksa_text: Skill in building executive alignment for data and AI transformation programs, including stakeholder mapping, coalition building, and resistant stakeholder engagement.

dcwf.top_element_label: Collaborate with stakeholders to identify and/or develop appropriate solutions technology.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

Collaborate with stakeholders to identify and/or develop appropriate solutions technology.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA LS-S-002 (LS, Skill) does not clear the weak fit inclusion threshold of 0.52. Composite score 0.4530 is insufficient to establish relevance to survey design, statistical analysis, and research data management at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (nist_ai_rmf=0.453, ddat=0.414, eu_ai_act=0.408) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude upheld. Score 0.4530 below threshold for weak fit domain; no rescuing analytics text signals. No internal inconsistencies identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does LS-domain KSA LS-S-002 (composite 0.4530) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Composite 0.4530 for LS domain does not meet the evidentiary bar for ANL IC-level inclusion per Leadership competencies in IC-to-senior-IC analytics roles are limited to peer influence and technical mentorship, not organizational strategy. External sources confirm this competency is not a standard expectation for Survey Researcher at the targeted seniority band.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms LS domain KSA at composite 0.4530 is not a standard requirement for Survey Researcher at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.4530, domain LS, scope weak fit. High confidence.
